prompt: A highly realistic aviation photograph of a China Southern Airbus A380 rotating for takeoff at Shanghai Pudong International Airport, captured from the side in a telephoto spotter style. The aircraft is climbing slightly nose-up just above the runway with landing gear still extended, all four engines visible, white fuselage with a deep blue cheatline, large Chinese airline lettering on the forward fuselage, English airline name along the side, and a bright blue tailfin with a red kapok flower logo. Show the airport terminal buildings in the background and a tall air traffic control tower on the right side, under clear daylight with mild haze and realistic airport atmosphere. Include runway edge details, taxiway signs, dry grass foreground, and at least 2 small background aircraft near the terminal, one plausibly resembling an older China Eastern livery. Natural documentary photography, sharp detail, accurate proportions, realistic lighting, 3:2 composition, no illustration styling, no dramatic sunset colors.
